name: Beauty On the Run
original_name: คุณชายเลี้ยงหมู คุณหนูเลี้ยงแกะ
overview: Phuwanai is a cop whose father owns a pig farm. He gets a leave from work and decides to help his father with the farm. Paipaya is a dancer who witnessed the mob killing someone, so she runs away from them and ends up hiding at Phuwanai's farm, pretending to be his nephew's tutor.

trailers.title: คุณชายเลี้ยงหมู คุณหนูเลี้ยงแกะ - ฉากปู ไปรยา จิ๊บ คีตภัทร เต้น โคโยตี้
